news.title:
NCC Ltd received five orders worth Rs. 2469.53 Cr in March 2026.
Orders include Rs. 1291.9 Cr for Water, Rs. 793.48 Cr for Buildings, and Rs. 384.15 Cr for Transportation.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd received five orders worth Rs. 2469.53 Cr in March 2026.
Orders include Rs. 1291.9 Cr for Water, Rs. 793.48 Cr for Buildings, and Rs. 384.15 Cr for Transportation.

news.title:
NCC Ltd secures a Rs. 326.1 Cr order in Feb 2026 for its Water Division.
The order was received in the normal course of business, excluding GST.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd secures a Rs. 326.1 Cr order in Feb 2026 for its Water Division.
The order was received in the normal course of business, excluding GST.

news.title:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.
news.summary:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.

news.title:
Telangana HC suspends NHAI debarment order on NCC Ltd until next hearing.
NCC shares fell 0.39%, ending at ₹152.8 on BSE amid unclear outlook.
news.summary:
Telangana HC suspends NHAI debarment order on NCC Ltd until next hearing.
NCC shares fell 0.39%, ending at ₹152.8 on BSE amid unclear outlook.

news.title:
NHAI issued a debarment order against NCC Ltd, which the company challenged in Delhi HC.
The court granted interim relief, suspending the order until March 10, 2026. NCC plans further legal steps.
news.summary:
NHAI issued a debarment order against NCC Ltd, which the company challenged in Delhi HC.
The court granted interim relief, suspending the order until March 10, 2026. NCC plans further legal steps.

news.title: NCC shares fall nearly 6% after being barred from NHAI tenders for 2 years.
news.summary: NCC shares fall nearly 6% after being barred from NHAI tenders for 2 years.

news.title:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
TVS Motor produces 1M vehicles in Indonesia; Jindal Saw's API license suspended post audit.
news.summary:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
TVS Motor produces 1M vehicles in Indonesia; Jindal Saw's API license suspended post audit.

news.title: NCC and OB Infra face a 2-year ban from NHAI tenders starting Feb 17, 2026.
news.summary: NCC and OB Infra face a 2-year ban from NHAI tenders starting Feb 17, 2026.

news.title: NCC shares face pressure due to an uncertain full-year outlook affecting Q3 results.
news.summary: NCC shares face pressure due to an uncertain full-year outlook affecting Q3 results.

news.title:
NCC Ltd shared an investor presentation on unaudited Q3FY26 results, highlighting Rs 4,900 cr revenue and Rs 122 cr PAT.
Order book stands at Rs 79,571 cr, reflecting 43% YoY growth, showcasing strong execution and sustainability focus.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd shared an investor presentation on unaudited Q3FY26 results, highlighting Rs 4,900 cr revenue and Rs 122 cr PAT.
Order book stands at Rs 79,571 cr, reflecting 43% YoY growth, showcasing strong execution and sustainability focus.

news.title:
NCC's Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹4.36B from ₹4.42B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 8.96% versus 8.27% YoY.
news.summary:
NCC's Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹4.36B from ₹4.42B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 8.96% versus 8.27% YoY.

news.title:
NCC Ltd reported 9M FY26 standalone revenue at ₹13,829.6 crore.
Standalone PBT for 9M FY26 was ₹441.4 crore; merger with NCC Infra on Feb 28, 2026.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd reported 9M FY26 standalone revenue at ₹13,829.6 crore.
Standalone PBT for 9M FY26 was ₹441.4 crore; merger with NCC Infra on Feb 28, 2026.

news.title:
NCC Ltd received Rs. 2456.9 Cr orders in Jan 2026, excluding GST.
Orders include Rs. 1922.3 Cr for Water, Rs. 290 Cr for Transport, Rs. 244.6 Cr for Electrical.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd received Rs. 2456.9 Cr orders in Jan 2026, excluding GST.
Orders include Rs. 1922.3 Cr for Water, Rs. 290 Cr for Transport, Rs. 244.6 Cr for Electrical.

news.title:
NCC Ltd's subsidiary amalgamation approved by NCLT Hyderabad, effective post certified order.
Subsidiary reported Rs.48L revenue, Rs.33.5Cr net loss; holding co. posted Rs.18,314Cr revenue, Rs.631Cr profit FY24.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd's subsidiary amalgamation approved by NCLT Hyderabad, effective post certified order.
Subsidiary reported Rs.48L revenue, Rs.33.5Cr net loss; holding co. posted Rs.18,314Cr revenue, Rs.631Cr profit FY24.

news.title:
NCC Ltd will hold an analyst/investor conference call on Feb 6, 2026, to discuss Q3FY26 results.
The call will feature key executives and is organized by JM Financial; no unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd will hold an analyst/investor conference call on Feb 6, 2026, to discuss Q3FY26 results.
The call will feature key executives and is organized by JM Financial; no unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared.

news.title:
NCC Ltd's board will meet on February 5, 2026, to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited financial results.
The trading window for insiders remains closed until February 7, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd's board will meet on February 5, 2026, to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited financial results.
The trading window for insiders remains closed until February 7, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Key stocks in focus include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NCC, Hudco, and Tata Steel, with notable updates.
Tata Steel raises stake in JV to 99.99%, NCC secures Rs 1,237 crore orders, and Hudco sanctions Rs 1.4 lakh crore loans.
news.summary:
Key stocks in focus include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NCC, Hudco, and Tata Steel, with notable updates.
Tata Steel raises stake in JV to 99.99%, NCC secures Rs 1,237 crore orders, and Hudco sanctions Rs 1.4 lakh crore loans.

news.title: NCC won contracts worth ₹1,237.2 crore in Dec 2025 for building and transportation projects.
news.summary: NCC won contracts worth ₹1,237.2 crore in Dec 2025 for building and transportation projects.

news.title:
NCC Ltd secured four new orders worth ₹1,237.2 crore in December, with ₹704.7 crore in buildings and ₹532.6 crore in transportation.
Shares closed at ₹160.4, down 3.5% on NSE; Q2 revenue fell 12.6% YoY to ₹4,543 crore, EBITDA margin rose slightly to 8.7%.
news.summary:
NCC Ltd secured four new orders worth ₹1,237.2 crore in December, with ₹704.7 crore in buildings and ₹532.6 crore in transportation.
Shares closed at ₹160.4, down 3.5% on NSE; Q2 revenue fell 12.6% YoY to ₹4,543 crore, EBITDA margin rose slightly to 8.7%.

news.title:
NCC's order book grew from ₹19,323 Cr in FY15 to ₹71,957 Cr in Q2 FY26, with diversified projects across infrastructure segments.
NCC's Q2 FY26 revenue dropped 13% YoY to ₹4,543 Cr, with net profit down 5% to ₹167 Cr. Stock trades at a P/E of 13.5.
news.summary:
NCC's order book grew from ₹19,323 Cr in FY15 to ₹71,957 Cr in Q2 FY26, with diversified projects across infrastructure segments.
NCC's Q2 FY26 revenue dropped 13% YoY to ₹4,543 Cr, with net profit down 5% to ₹167 Cr. Stock trades at a P/E of 13.5.
